Set up VMD Config BAR attribute, like 64-bit or prefetchable. First Byte:Represents VMD Config BAR Attribute for PCH port. Second Byte:Represents VMD Config BAR Attribute for IOU 0  Each Byte takes value of 0x0:(32-bit non-prefetchable),0x1:(64-bit non-prefetchable), 0x2:(64-bit prefetchable)
Setup VMD Memory BAR1 size (in bits Min=0x14,max=0x27), ex: 0x14(20 bits)=1MB  First Byte:Represents VMD Memory BAR1 size for PCH port  Second Byte:Represents VMD Memory BAR1 size for IOU 0

Set up VMD Memory BAR1 attribute, like 64-bit or prefetchable First Byte:Represents VMD Memory BAR1 attribute for PCH port  Second Byte:Represents VMD Memory BAR1 attribute for IOU 0  Each Byte takes value of 0x0:(32-bit non-prefetchable),0x1:(64-bit non-prefetchable), 0x2:(64-bit prefetchable)

Setup VMD Memory BAR2 size (in bits Min=0x14,max = 0x27), ex: 0x14(20bits)=1MB, 0x16(22bits)=4MB. First Byte:Represents VMD Memory BAR2 size for PCH port. Second Byte:Represents VMD Memory BAR2 size for IOU 0

Set up VMD Memory BAR2 attribute, like 64-bit or prefetchable. First Byte:Represents VMD Memory BAR2 attribute for PCH port. Second Byte:Represents VMD Memory BAR2 attribute for IOU 0  Each Byte takes value of 0x0:(32-bit non-prefetchable),0x1:(64-bit non-prefetchable), 0x2:(64-bit prefetchable)

Enable/ Disable VMD for Direct Assign if VMD is enabled  First Byte:Represents VMD for Direct Assign for PCH port  Second Byte:Represents VMD for Direct Assign for IOU 0  Each byte takes value 0x00(Disable)~0x01(Enable)

Each one of 12 PCH VppAddresses are represented by a nibble.For example, nibble 0 controls VppAddress 0, nibble 1 controls VppAddress 1.A nibble takes value 0~7. The last 4 nibbles are unused. Nibble default value: 0x7
